'''hazhaha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zemeism|zemeism]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-zh-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zemeism|zemeism]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| hazhaha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæzhæhæth|hæzhæhæth]] || [[word:hæzhæhæj|hæzhæhæj]] || [[word:hæzhæhæsh|hæzhæhæsh]] || [[word:hæzhæhæ|hæzhæhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hazhazhahath|hazhazhahath]] || [[word:hazhazhahaj|hazhazhahaj]] || [[word:hazhazhahash|hazhazhahash]] || [[word:hazhazhaha|hazhazhaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hazhahath|hazhahath]] || [[word:hazhahaj|hazhahaj]] || [[word:hazhahash|hazhahash]] || [[word:hazhaha|hazhaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hazhafhath|hazhafhath]] || [[word:hazhafhaj|hazhafhaj]] || [[word:hazhafhash|hazhafhash]] || [[word:hazhafhaf|hazhafhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hazhahatha|hazhahatha]] || [[word:hazhahaja|hazhahaja]] || [[word:hazhahasha|hazhahasha]] || [[word:hazhahaka|hazhahaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hazhahath|hazhahath]] || [[word:hazhahaj|hazhahaj]] || [[word:hazhahash|hazhahash]] || [[word:hazhaha|hazhaha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hazhahathal|hazhahathal]] || [[word:hazhahajal|hazhahajal]] || [[word:hazhahashal|hazhahashal]] || [[word:hazhahakal|hazhahakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hazhahathatha|hazhahathatha]] || [[word:hazhahajaja|hazhahajaja]] || [[word:hazhahashasha|hazhahashasha]] || [[word:hazhahaka|hazhahaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hazhahathan|hazhahathan]] || [[word:hazhahajan|hazhahajan]] || [[word:hazhahashan|hazhahashan]] || [[word:hazhahakan|hazhahakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hazhahathaoro|hazhahathaoro]] || [[word:hazhahajaoro|hazhahajaoro]] || [[word:hazhahashaoro|hazhahashaoro]] || [[word:hazhahakaoro|hazhahakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a249b1f}}
